# SAMI Project Portfolio icon assets

- The approved source artwork is preserved at `assets\new icon.png`.
- Web/PWA sizes are derived into `assets\icons`, and the Windows shortcut icon is derived at `assets\sami_project_portfolio.ico`.
- Do not use official SAMI, SA Health, or Government logos unless the asset has been explicitly approved.
- Recommended style: a teal/aqua medical-imaging motif combined with a clear project-portfolio dashboard icon.

The Windows ICO should contain common shortcut sizes from 16 x 16 through 256 x 256 where practical.
